text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand and interact with human language. One important use is text understanding, where a computer can grasp the meaning of sentences, such as in news articles. NLP also powers translation tools, allowing people to communicate across different languages. Another application is sentiment analysis, which companies use to determine if customer reviews are positive or negative. Finally, many chatbots rely on NLP to have simple conversations with users, answering questions or providing support. In short, NLP makes it possible for machines to work with language in practical ways.
